zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Johanna de Lambley於大約1212年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾迪德斯維爾時，她的父親Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire28歲，母親Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly20歲。她於1251年10月17日與John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby在英國倫敦結婚。她去世於1256年在英國英格蘭素福爾可可斯福德享年45歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Johanna de Lambley于大约1212年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾迪德斯維爾时，她的父亲Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire28岁，母亲Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly20岁。她于1251年10月17日与John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby在英国倫敦结婚。她去世于1256年在英国英格兰素福爾可可斯福德享年45岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾沃本。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lambley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Lambley (Notts) or Lambley (Northumb).

variants.name: Lampley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): probably a habitational name from Lamplugh in Cumbria, from Proto-Welsh llan ‘enclosure, church’ + a word related to Middle Cornish blogh ‘bald, bare’, or a variant of Lambley, a habitational name from Lambley (Nottinghamshire) or Lambley (Northumberland). These placenames derive from Old English lamb ‘lamb’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Johanna de Lambley was born about 1212, in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire, was 28 and her mother, Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly, was 20. She married John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby on 17 October 1251, in London, England. She died in 1256, in Cosford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Woburn, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Johanna de Lambley est née environ 1212, à Tideswell, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby le 17 octobre 1251, à Londres, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1256, à Cosford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Woburn, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.Ampthill, Bedfordshire, England, United: Ampthill Manor, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Johanna de Lambley um 1212 in Tideswell, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire 28 und ihre Mutter Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly 20. Sie hat am 17. Oktober 1251 in London, England John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby geheiratet. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Cosford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Woburn, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Johanna de Lambleyが約1212年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアティデスウエルで生まれた時，父Thomas de Lambley ,Esquireは28歳，母Esquiress Agnes D' Oillyは20歳であった。1251年10月17日にイギリスロンドンでJohn De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derbyと結婚した。彼女は1256年にイギリスイギリススフォルクコスフォードで45歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Johanna de Lambley(이)가 대략 1212년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 티데스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1251년 10월 17일 영국 런던에서 John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 코스퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Johanna de Lambley nasceu aproximadamente 1212, em Tideswell, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby em 17 de outubro de 1251, em London, Inglaterra. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Johanna de Lambley родилась около 1212 г. в местности тидесвелл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Lambley ,Esquire было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Esquiress Agnes D' Oilly, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby 17 октября 1251 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. Она умерла в 1256 г. в местности косфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности вобурн, бедфордшир, Англия.
